title: E R C20 Token
content:
- ### OntologyBlock
- ## About ERC-20 Token
  - USDC, LINK, UNI, DAI
  - Proposed by Fabian Vogelsteller in 2015 as EIP-20.

ontology.definition: A fungible token implementing the ERC-20 standard on Ethereum blockchain. The most widely used Ethereum token standard providing uniform API for token operations within smart contracts.
